General.Name: Guoquan Food (Shanghai) Co Ltd
General.Description: Guoquan Food (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. operates as a home meal products company in Mainland China. The company offers ready-to-eat, ready-to-heat, and ready-to-cook meals; at-home prepared hotpot and barbecue ingredients; condiments and sauce products; beverages; fresh food; and western food and snacks. It also provides barbecue products, solo-dining meals, hotpot soup base products, meatballs, shrimp paste, meat, vegetables, and pots and grills. In addition, the company offers supply chain management, information technology, and enterprise management services. Further, it processes and sells aquatic products. The company sells its products through a network of stores under the Guoquan Shihui brand, as well as through online channels. Guoquan Food (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
